briefs.title: Insurance agents and adjusters in BC must now follow updated continuing education rules
briefs.summary: BC has updated the rules for who must complete continuing education (ongoing training required to keep a licence) under the Insurance Council Regulation. The change clarifies that general insurance agents, life insurance agents, general insurance salespersons, and insurance adjusters must participate in the Insurance Council's continuing education program — while employees and agents of restricted insurance agent licensees are excluded.
briefs.action_required: Check if your insurance licence type requires continuing education under the updated Insurance Council rules.
